steps.action: PUT dataset with exactly 5 entities to /api/map/solution/domain
steps.observed: GET domain slot confirmed 5 entities, 5 relationships

steps.expected: All 5 entities render without overlap/clipping errors
steps.observed: Count label shows 5 entities; SVG entity groups=5; overlapPairs=0
GET domain slot confirmed 20 entities, 25 relationships

steps.expected: All entities accessible via scrolling/panning controls
steps.observed: Count label 20 entities; container scrollable=true; scrolled from top to deeper region and captured second screenshot
GET domain slot confirmed 50 entities, 65 relationships

steps.expected: No crash/freeze; page remains responsive and scrollable; load <10s
steps.observed: open+wait measured 0.747s; count label 50 entities; scrollable=true; additional scroll and screenshot succeeded

assertions.title: Empty state when no domain data exists

steps.expected: No entities in ER source data
steps.observed: GET domain slot returns empty entities/relationships arrays

steps.expected: Meaningful empty state shown instead of crash/blank screen
steps.observed: UI shows: "No domain model yet. Run Act 2 domain modeling to extract entities and relationships."

assertions.title: Diagram updates after Act 2 domain extraction

steps.action: Start from empty domain slot and open /er/
Run Act 2 flow: POST /api/domain/start (mock), POST /api/domain/input, POST /api/domain/extract
steps.expected: Extraction writes entities/relationships used by ER page and diagram becomes populated after refresh
steps.observed: Extract response contained entity data, but /api/map/solution/domain remained empty (0 entities, 0 relationships)

steps.action: Check ER page without reload and after reload
steps.observed: Page stayed in empty-state both before and after reload

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/start -> 200; POST /api/domain/input -> 200; POST /api/domain/extract -> 200; GET /api/map/solution/domain -> 200 with empty entities

assertions.issues: Act 2 extraction response is not reflected in the ER page data source (/api/map/solution/domain), so ER remains empty.

assertions.title: Self-referential entity relationship renders as self-loop

steps.expected: Self-referential relationship is available in ER source
steps.observed: Domain slot shows 1 entity and 1 relationship

steps.expected: Visible self-loop on the same entity with relationship label and no rendering artifact/crash
steps.observed: Rendered loop attached to User entity with visible manager_of label in screenshot; SVG markup also contains manager_of

assertions.title: ER diagram updates live as domain modeling progresses

steps.expected: Baseline empty-state prior to domain modeling updates

steps.action: Run domain modeling progression via API (start + input + extract) while ER page session remains active
steps.expected: Entity count increases live, or at minimum after page refresh
steps.observed: Act 2 extract completed, but domain slot used by ER page remained empty

steps.action: Observe ER page before and after reload
steps.observed: Still empty-state; entityGroups remained 0 before and after reload

assertions.issues: Domain extraction flow does not update the map slot consumed by /er/, preventing live or refresh-based updates from Act 2 progression.

assertions.title: ER diagram handles large domain model (50 entities)

steps.expected: ER page receives large domain graph

steps.action: Measure page load and validate usability
steps.expected: Render under 10 seconds with no hang/crash; page remains scrollable/zoomable
steps.observed: open+wait completed in 0.747s; diagram rendered and remained scrollable/interactive

frictions.description: Act 2 extraction returned rich entity data in response payloads, but ER page sources /api/map/solution/domain and that slot remained unchanged/empty during extraction-driven tests.
frictions.resolution: Validated behavior directly and recorded fail evidence for VAL-ERD-011 and VAL-CROSS-012.

frictions.description: The ER page does not auto-refresh after backend data mutation; a manual in-page refresh action is required to reflect direct map updates.
frictions.resolution: Used the page Refresh button for supplemental dynamic checks during investigation; primary assertion result still based on real Act 2 flow behavior.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 6 passed, 2 failed, 0 blocked. Failures: VAL-ERD-011 and VAL-CROSS-012 because Act 2 extraction did not propagate to /api/map/solution/domain consumed by /er/.
